column1: # 4MB flash — ~1.9MB per OTA app slot (REQUIRED for this sketch with OTA enabled)
#   Tools → Custom Partition CSV → select this file (partitions.csv in sketch folder)
# Or: Tools → Partition Scheme → "Minimal SPIFFS (1.9MB APP with OTA)"
# Default "Huge APP" / 1.25MB OTA slots = max 1310720 bytes → sketch too big.
